executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch (Attempt 3). Critical configuration error detected: GitHub Actions workflow file not found at expected path .github/workflows/build.yml. This prevents any build execution from occurring. The workflow dispatch API returned HTTP 404, indicating the workflow file is either missing, incorrectly named, or not accessible with current permissions.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates the workflow file does not exist at the expected path or is not accessible.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository at the specified branch (main), or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/dispatch the workflow, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

automated_remediation: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with standard Maven build configuration
Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
Validate GitHub token has workflow and actions:write permissions
Ensure workflow file is committed to the main branch
manual_steps: Navigate to repository settings and enable GitHub Actions if disabled
Review GitHub token permissions and regenerate if necessary with workflow scope
Create workflow file at .github/workflows/build.yml with Maven build steps
Commit and push workflow file to main branch
Verify workflow appears in Actions tab of GitHub repository
recommended_fix.compliance_notes: Workflow file creation must follow enterprise CI/CD standards. Ensure workflow includes security scanning, artifact signing, and audit logging as per DevSecOps policy.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Authentication/Permission Issue
errors.description: The GitHub API token may lack required permissions (workflow, actions:write) to dispatch workflows, or the repository has Actions disabled.
errors.error_message: Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled.
errors.root_cause: GitHub personal access token (PAT) may not have workflow scope enabled, which is required to trigger workflow_dispatch events. Alternatively, repository settings may have Actions disabled.
errors.impact: Unable to programmatically trigger builds via API. Manual workflow triggers from GitHub UI may still work if Actions is enabled, but automated CI/CD pipeline is broken.

automated_remediation: Validate token scopes include workflow and actions:write
Check repository Actions settings via GitHub API
Generate new token with correct scopes if current token is insufficient
manual_steps: Go to GitHub Settings > Developer settings > Personal access tokens
Verify token has workflow scope checked
If missing, generate new token with required scopes: repo, workflow, actions:write
Test workflow dispatch with new token
recommended_fix.compliance_notes: Token management must follow least-privilege principle. Use fine-grained tokens where possible. Rotate tokens quarterly per security policy. Store tokens in enterprise secret management system.

summary.failure_reason: Workflow file not found - build could not be initiated

compliance_audit_log.analysis_method: Automated log parsing and error classification
compliance_audit_log.escalation_reason: Critical configuration error blocking all builds. Requires immediate DevOps team intervention.

next_steps: IMMEDIATE: Create .github/workflows/build.yml file with Maven build configuration
IMMEDIATE: Verify GitHub Actions is enabled in repository settings
IMMEDIATE: Validate GitHub token permissions include workflow scope
SHORT_TERM: Implement workflow file validation in repository setup automation
SHORT_TERM: Add pre-flight checks to verify workflow existence before dispatch
LONG_TERM: Implement repository template with standard workflow files

auto_fix_actions: Generate standard Maven build.yml workflow file
Trigger test build to verify workflow execution
automated_remediation_status.approval_reason: Workflow file creation modifies repository structure and CI/CD pipeline configuration
